summary: Complete frontend testing of BookMyVenue hero section redesign. All 19 test features passed successfully. The hero section now features deep navy gradient background with gold accents on 'Coordinate' and 'Celebrate' words, premium white search card, and updated CTAs.
test_credentials: N/A - No auth required for landing page
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hero section redesigned from white to deep navy gradient premium design. Rest of page (How It Works, Why BMV, Bookings in Motion, City Coverage, For Venues, Footer) remains unchanged from iteration_30.

hero_section_tests.dark_navy_gradient_background: PASS - bg-gradient-to-b from-[#080C18] via-[#0E1525] to-[#131B2E] applied
hero_section_tests.headline: PASS - 'We Coordinate. You Celebrate.' renders correctly
hero_section_tests.subheadline_experts: PASS - 'dedicated experts manage availability, negotiation, and documentation'
hero_section_tests.primary_cta_start_booking: PASS - Gold 'Start Your Booking' button with bg-[#C7A14A]
hero_section_tests.secondary_cta_talk_expert: PASS - 'Talk to an Expert' with phone icon and outlined border

search_card_tests.white_card_on_dark_bg: PASS - White search card with shadow on dark hero
search_card_tests.search_submit_button: PASS - 'Start Your Booking' gold submit button

trust_strip_tests.verified_venues: PASS - '3,000+ Verified Venues' with gold check icon
trust_strip_tests.rm_coordination: PASS - 'Dedicated RM Coordination' with gold check icon
trust_strip_tests.negotiation_process: PASS - 'Structured Negotiation Process' with gold check icon
trust_strip_tests.booking_documentation: PASS - 'Secure Booking Documentation' with gold check icon

nav_tests.bmv_gold_logo: PASS - BMV logo with gold bg-[#C7A14A] background
nav_tests.white_nav_links: PASS - How It Works, Why BMV, Cities, For Venues links in white
nav_tests.get_started_button: PASS - 'Get Started' gold button navigates to /register

city_coverage_tests.eight_cities: PASS - Delhi NCR, Mumbai, Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Pune, Jaipur, Goa, Udaipur

footer_tests.platform_links: PASS - Browse Venues, How It Works, For Venues
footer_tests.cities_links: PASS - Delhi NCR, Mumbai, Bengaluru, Hyderabad

design_validation.dot_grid_overlay: PASS - Subtle radial gradient dot pattern at 0.025 opacity
design_validation.gold_accent_color: #C7A14A applied to CTAs, icons, and highlighted text
design_validation.white_search_card: PASS - White rounded-xl card with shadow-2xl on dark background
design_validation.rest_of_page_white: PASS - Sections below hero maintain white/structured design
